global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body, predominantly white plumage, and distinctive red legs. It features a gray back and wings, a black-tipped tail, and a short, yellow bill. The bird's feathers are smooth and sleek, adapted for efficient flight.

part_details.plumage: Predominantly white with smooth, sleek feathers.
part_details.wings: Gray with a streamlined shape, adapted for flight.

spatial_relations: The gray wings extend from the sides of the white body.
The red legs are positioned underneath the body.
The black-tipped tail extends from the rear of the body.
The yellow bill protrudes from the front of the head.
